--- title: "test" format: pdf: default html: default --- ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} library(tinytable) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Warning: package 'tinytable' was built under R version 4.4.3 ``` ::: ::: # Option 1 ## Without label (works) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} tmp <- rbind(mtcars, mtcars)[, 1:6] cap <- "A long 80\\% width table with repeating headers." tt(tmp, width = .8, caption = cap) |> theme_latex(multipage = TRUE, rowhead = 1) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
